content.en:
Airplanes!!!

With the blessing of the Mixed Yuan Order, Ye Tian created his own realm of will rules, and all the legendary eternal techniques could exert an incomparably terrifying effect.

At this moment, Ye Tiankan was a relatively weak Realm Legendary Lord, and his strength was much stronger than Qin Yu.

Bang!!!!

Qin Yu was directly hit by Ye Tian's Eternal Extreme Dao Fist, and Qin Yu's attack fell on Ye Tian's Will Wall Light, all of which were intercepted, and only a small part of the power penetrated into the Will Wall Light, but it was neutralized by the Void True Body.

In the end, none of Qin Yu's attacks could cause any damage to Ye Tian.

On the other hand, Ye Tian's every blow was enough to seriously injure Qin Yu, so the battle between the two sides was already a foregone conclusion.

"Let's make a move together!"

Qin Yu was anxious and immediately ordered.

Whoa!!

The group of Legendary Realm Lords under Qin Yu's command were no longer silent, and they all came to help Qin Yu, and the Dark Mist Lord also gritted his teeth to help the Dark Mist Lord.

Things had already developed to this extent, and he couldn't reconcile with Ye Tian at all, even other Legendary Realm Lords wouldn't be polite to him.

Rather than this, it is better to directly choose 107 to deal with Ye Tian, in case the situation can really be reversed, there is still a chance of survival.

With so many Legendary Realm Lords, the strength of a single person is not strong, if it is cooperated with Qin Yu, it will really be of great help.

But at the moment when they were about to make a move, Ye Tian's duplicate body made a move, and the other Legendary Realm Lords in the space-time territory did not stand idly by, and chose to take action to resist these Legendary Realm Lords from the Infinite Sea.

And the Dark Mist Lord was also targeted by Ye Tian's copy body, although this copy body did not have an eternal treasure, but its combat power was also comparable to that of the Legendary Lord of the Consummation Realm, the Dark Mist Lord was just an ordinary Legendary Lord, where was Ye Tian's opponent.

If it was before, the Dark Mist Lord would still be qualified to fight with Ye Tian, but now he has no chance at all.

"Come and help me!"

The Dark Mist Lord panicked and asked other Legendary Realm Lords to help him resist Ye Tian's copy body together, but everyone else had their own opponents, where would they help him!

Wow!

The Lord of the Dark Mist cast the Shadow Body of the Dark Mist, turning into a series of shadow bodies.

And at this time, Ye Tian directly cast the legendary eternal technique-100 million voids!

Airplanes!

The Void was compressed into one layer, directly causing the shadows of the Dark Mist Lord to collapse.At the moment when the Dark Mist Lord fell, Ye Tian stopped and only sealed it

Right now, the Lord of the Mist is still valuable, so it can't be killed.

Next.

Ye Tian's several large copies of the body shot and killed the Legendary Realm Lords, and after a while, only Qin Yu was left here, and all his subordinates were killed.

"Endless Lord, this is just my doppelganger, how about leaving me alone?"

Qin Yu admitted.

"Not good!" Ye Tian refused.

"Endless Lord, I am a member of the Qin family of the Infinite Sea, do you really want to be completely an enemy of me?" Qin Yu said angrily

"An eternal treasure, worthy of my enemies of yours!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Qin Yu couldn't refute it, the value of the Eternal Treasure was indeed very high, if it weren't for the fact that he felt that the Source Sea was too weak, he wouldn't have fallen, otherwise he wouldn't have let this clone come with the Eternal Treasure Fire Domain Sword.

The value of an Eternal Treasure was enough to make the two Legendary Realm Lords turn against each other, and Ye Tian would indeed kill him for the sake of the Eternal Treasure.

If it were him, he would definitely do it.

As for the threat, hehe, if the threat had been useful, there wouldn't have been so many fights in the Infinite Sea or elsewhere.

Whoa!!!

Ye Tian's several major replica bodies teamed up to attack Qin Yu, completely making Qin Yu lose his last hope of escaping

Soon, Qin Yu was already on the verge of death, and at this time, Ye Tian did not choose to bombard the other party, but chose to seal it.

This was to seize the Eternal Supreme Treasure Fire Domain Sword in his body.

If Qin Yu is killed, then the Fire Domain Sword will form a space-time barrier, and it will be in a time and space that is difficult to reach, and at that time, Ye Tian will need to comprehend the Eternal Dao inside the Fire Domain Sword and cultivate to the entry realm before he can reach the Fire Domain Sword.

But if Qin Yu is still alive, forcibly deprived of the Fire Domain Sword, and then forcibly refined, the Fire Domain Sword will not be able to escape into time and space, and when the time comes, if Qin Yu is killed, the Fire Domain Sword can also be touched, this is the real way to take away the Fire Domain Sword.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't expect this method, plus it was a prison, which had a lot of inconvenience.

But now, Ye Tian doesn't need to take care of it

Wow!

Ye Tian's copy body took the sealed Qin Yu and the Dark Mist Lord and left here and went to the Blood and Bone Territory.

As for the corpses of the other Legendary Realm Lords, Ye Tian gave one to the Five Legendary Realm Lords, and the treasures on their bodies were also left to the Five Legendary Lords, which had been discussed before, otherwise, the Five Legendary Lords would not have acted so decisively.

The entire net worth of a Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea, how many treasures are contained in it, the five Legendary Lords are also very curious, and there may be treasures or inheritances that help them break through.

Immediately, the five legendary lords went back one by one to check the harvest, as for the consequences and impact of this matter, you can discuss it slowly in the future, and there is no need to worry for the time being.

-

Ye Tian's copy body dealt with Qin Yu's affairs, and a copy body dealt with the affairs of the Dark Mist Lord.

He wanted to get some information from the mouth of the Dark Mist Lord, such as information about the Infinite Sea, how to get to the Infinite Sea, and so on.

Let the Lord of the Mist take the initiative to say it, that's almost unlikely.

The Lord of the Dark Mist would probably guess his own end, so it was impossible to tell the truth, and even if he did, it would probably be a trap for the pit people.

Therefore, if you want to obtain true information, you can only forcibly disintegrate the will of the Darkmist Lord and thus obtain his memory.

If it was at the same level, it wouldn't be possible at all, but Ye Tian was much stronger than the Dark Mist Lord, so he had a certain hope of gaining his memory.

In order to be able to succeed, Ye Tian first copied the body of the Dark Mist Lord, and used this replicated body to conduct experiments

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian's extremely powerful will power penetrated into the will of the Dark Mist Lord, because Ye Tian was too familiar with the will of the Dark Mist Lord, he easily completed the memory capture, but it still made the Dark Mist Lord's will collapse.

But the memory has already arrived, and Ye Tian doesn't care anymore.

In an instant, he obliterated the Lord of the Darkmist. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
